headline: How The Microsoft (MSFT) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Spending And Valuation Rethinks
summary: Microsoft’s updated fair value estimate has been set at US$579.57, slightly below the prior US$587.31 price target. That modest change aligns with recent Street research, which combines optimism around AI and cloud with a more careful stance on what investors might reasonably pay for those themes today. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving Microsoft story. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Microsoft shifts by adding it to your...

headline: How will AI matter for labor markets?
summary: Investing.com -- As the debate over artificial intelligence and its potential to upend global labor markets intensifies, analysts at Morgan Stanley argue that history suggests the impact will be more evolutionary than immediate, with new technologies serving to augment workers rather than replace them entirely.

headline: How Nvidia left gamers broken hearted in the era of AI
summary: For its first 30 years, Nvidia wasn’t a household name unless you were a gamer. When the company approached bankruptcy in 1999, gaming enthusiasts saved Nvidia by snapping up its first GPU, the GeForce 256. But with more than 91% of Nvidia’s revenue now coming from data center chips, and a global memory shortage caused by soaring demand for AI, Nvidia’s original fan base feels pushed aside. Some even feel outraged, due to Nvidia’s use of AI in a new gaming tool called DLSS 5.
